g.text: Open Search Cluster Reconcile State Machine
read spec, status, delete intent, and OCI lifecycle
- Supported drift splits into immutable-reject, horizontal
resize, vertical resize, and general update branches.
- Confirm deletion with GetOpenSearchCluster until the
resource is DELETED or not found.
unsupported or immutable drift is detected
wait for the spec or live state to change
OCI deletion is confirmed and the finalizer can be removed
